title: Session Digest
description: Frontmatter schema for state/digests/latest.md. The markdown body follows the section structure documented in .claude/skills/digest/SKILL.md. Karpathy R11: every AI step declares an output schema; runtime rejects mismatches.

written_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of last write.

trigger.description: Which writer produced this digest. digest-skill = model-driven rich content; the others = hook-driven metadata-only fallbacks.

last_model_update.description: When the model last wrote rich content sections via the digest skill. null when only hooks have written.

success_criteria.description: Karpathy R4 (goal-driven execution): every Next action declares testable criteria. The next /digest invocation marks each as achieved / in-progress / abandoned. 'task complete != goal achieved.'

evidence.description: Optional pointer to where achievement can be verified (file:line, commit, PR, metric path).
